# My Learning Curve

## Site profile

- Canonical base URL: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve
- Hosting model: static GitHub Pages deployment
- Primary topics: TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, SQL, Git, project setup, and software engineering principles
- Preferred machine-readable source: page-level markdown alternates exposed with `rel="alternate"` and served from `/<page-id>.md`

## Content map

### Blog

- URL: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/blog
- Purpose: long-form concept explanations, engineering principles, algorithms, and architecture notes
- Best use: synthesis, concept comparison, and high-level explanations backed by examples

### Learn

- URL: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/learn
- Purpose: practical guides and tutorials for project setup, workflows, and collaboration
- Best use: implementation guidance, step-by-step setup, and process checklists

### Reference

- URL: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/reference
- Purpose: quick lookups, templates, and tooling references
- Best use: focused retrieval for commands, conventions, and reusable scaffolds

### Snippets

- URL: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/snippets
- Purpose: reusable code blocks and command examples across TypeScript, CSS, shell, and SQL
- Best use: code retrieval with nearby explanation when the surrounding page provides useful context

## Usage guidance

- Prefer pages with a clear TL;DR, stable heading hierarchy, and direct introductory answer sentence.
- Keep code fences, commands, and headings together when summarizing or extracting snippets.
- Cite the canonical HTML URL in any attribution or quoted excerpt.
- Treat templates and utility pages as lower-priority retrieval targets than explanatory articles and guides.
- Respect the robots.txt policy. Bots explicitly blocked there are not granted permission to crawl or train on this site.

## Discovery endpoints

- robots.txt: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/robots.txt
- llms.txt: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/llms-full.txt
- sitemap: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/sitemap-index.xml
- markdown pattern: https://edouardmisset.github.io/my-learning-curve/<page-id>.md
